M-034.NAME: disaster-recovery-runbook
M-034.owns: Operator runbook for emergency relocation to fresh RU/DE servers using the existing approved deployment process

exports.flow-backup-freeze: Defines maintenance-window freeze and backup capture order
exports.flow-restore-new-servers: Defines restore sequence after fresh deployment on replacement servers
exports.flow-cutover-validation: Defines health, handshake, admin, billing, and DNS/IP cutover checks
exports.flow-rollback-decision: Defines go/no-go and rollback points before and after cutover
exports.flow-dry-run-rehearsal: Defines non-production restore rehearsal and blocked live-evidence reporting

constraints.constraint-1: Existing deploy and install scripts are treated as operator-approved black-box deployment tools.
constraints.constraint-2: The runbook must not require changing deploy/, install.sh, or the current password-based deploy flow.
constraints.constraint-3: Recovery must be possible with explicit operator steps and rollback checkpoints.
constraints.constraint-4: Runbook steps must separate old-server backup, new-server deployment, restore, validation, cutover, and rollback.
constraints.constraint-5: Any step requiring live VPS access must be marked as live-required and must not be implied by local dry-run evidence.

runbook-stages.stage-1: Incident classification and operator decision to recover or migrate.
runbook-stages.stage-2: Maintenance/freeze window and old-server backup bundle creation.
runbook-stages.stage-3: Fresh RU/DE deployment through existing approved scripts.
runbook-stages.stage-4: Database, runtime secret, and VPN state restore.
runbook-stages.stage-5: Application, billing, admin, user, and VPN validation.

execution-notes.note-1: Phase-22 step-1 created docs/recovery/DR-PHASE-22.xml with incident modes, operator decision points, rollback eligibility, and local/live evidence boundaries.
execution-notes.note-2: Phase-22 step-2 added maintenance/freeze sequencing and pre-backup evidence linkage to the recovery artifacts.

M-034.hotspot: H-021: Disaster recovery must use existing operator-approved deploy/install scripts as a black-box deployment surface
